## Product Brief
1. OneTrust develops governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) software with a focus on privacy, security, data protection, and AI governance.
2. Its platform includes tools for consent management, data mapping, third-party risk assessments, and regulatory compliance automation.
3. OneTrust's AI-Ready Governance Platform™ simplifies trust transformation, enabling responsible data use and mitigating risk.
